title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at CBRE India

jsonLd.title: Looking for Real Estate Agent at CBRE India
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Real Estate Agent looking for your next big career move? CBRE India in Kochi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About CBRE India:
CBRE India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Kochi, Kerala, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with CBRE India!
